scenes.narration: Merit week's almost here. Who's below minimum? Any manager making less than their team? ShiftWorks HR catches that before letters go out.
Just drop your payroll export in. Workday, ADP, whatever you've got — columns map themselves. No IT ticket.
About a minute later you've got cycle readiness — what's critical, what to fix, before you lock the cycle.
Below minimum? Every name, department, and dollar gap — right in the issue table your comp team already uses.
Pay equity's in there too — gender and race median gaps by group, so you can answer DEI questions with data.
Location pay works the same way. Median by office, gaps across cities — straight from your file.
Need to brief your CHRO? One click gets you a leadership PDF — risk, exposure, and what they'll actually ask about.
Try it free at shiftworkshr.com with your own roster. No credit card.
